scope.purpose: Read-only implementation matrix for every ACHR and ACRE changed-form envelope in pinned retail Save330.
scope.semanticRule: Only xEdit branch names and byte-shape conditions are named; fields called Unknown/Unk remain unknown.

changedFormEnvelope.rawType: u8: low 6 type bits, high 2 length-width bits

referenceResolution.FormIdArrayRule: payload 0 is explicit null; otherwise FormIDArray[payload - 1]

orderedEnvelopeClassStreamDecoder: Decode four unsigned LEB128 values per row.
Inverse-zigzag second value; accumulate both deltas from zero.
Flags use per-record dictionary; version/namespace/width are fixed.
Resolve referencePayloadIndex through pinned FormID table.
changedFormIndex is zero-based in full 7093-entry section.

orderedEnvelopeClassStream.encoding: base64(zlib(level=9, four unsigned LEB128 values per row))
base64(zlib(level=9, four unsigned LEB128 values per row))

observedChangeFlagBits.payloadRoleWithoutSemanticInference: u32 Flags field inside shared Changed REFR
selects Initial Data Type 04; no standalone payload
length-prefixed Havok Moved SubBuffer in Initial Data Type 04
shared changed-inventory array; gate is bit 5 OR bit 27
u8 Life State in Changed Actor
participates in actor Changed Extra mask
participates in actor Changed Extra mask
counted actor-value/float list in Middle Low Process
counted actor-value/float list in Changed Actor
actor length-prefixed animation; Player has second branch
participates in actor Changed Extra mask
participates in actor Changed Extra mask

sharedStructures.name: ProcessHierarchy
sharedStructures.note: internal process data, not flags alone, selects branches

minimalParserVariants.shape: actor-value prefix + Changed Character + second animation/player tail
shared core via Changed Creature, no character tail
branch on observed bits, then validate nested discriminators

explicitlyUncovered: No payload field is declared semantically understood; this is no parity credit.
Internal process/package/extra/pathing/inventory/animation/list/subbuffer discriminators are not decoded here.
Same flags and length do not prove identical nested union choices.
xEdit Unknown/Unk/Byt/Wrd names remain unknown; no meaning is inferred.
Resolved FormID is save-reference identity only; winning ESM base/type is not asserted.
Explicit-null ACHR has no FormID and needs fail-closed policy.
Namespaces 1/2, versions other than 27, and width 1/4 have zero actor observations.
Visuals, AI, equipment, combat, furniture, playback, saving and round-trip mutation are out of scope.

canonicalFingerprint.ordering: full changed-form order filtered to ACHR/ACRE

validationEquations: all 6206 resolved FormIDs unique; duplicate count 0
241 classes sum to 6207 envelopes and 2686682 payload bytes
